jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at HomeLane
jsonLd.description:
Join the HomeLane family as a SEO Specialist in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About HomeLane:
HomeLane is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeLane!
